query:
UPDATE project_task_board_items
                SET
                    status = COALESCE($2, status),
                    assigned_thread_id = CASE
                        WHEN $3 THEN $4
                        ELSE assigned_thread_id
                    END,
                    completed_at = CASE
                        WHEN $5 THEN $6
                        ELSE completed_at
                    END,
                    updated_at = $7
                WHERE id = $1
